allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add GLSL shader canvas with selectable effects

Includes WebGL renderer with five fragment shaders \(plasma, voronoi,
raymarch, mandelbulb, ikeda\) and a shared vertex shader, plus UI for
switching between effects.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
